global.description: The ad features a bold orange background with promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food delivery with a special offer.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Empty plate outline
elements.description: A simple outline of a plate, centered in the ad, with no fill color.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Fast food, fast' with a smaller line below it saying 'Free delivery over $15'.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15

elements.label: PlateSprint logo
elements.description: The word 'PlateSprint' in large, bold black font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded white button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now' in bold black font.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small text at the bottom left displaying '$4.99' in bold black font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, promotional text and call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the body text in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fast food, fast, Free delivery over $15, PlateSprint, Watch now, $4.99
